goal: Unify the remaining battle presentation asset references with shared helpers so migrated card ids, packaged paths, and fallback visuals behave consistently without deleting any existing content.
constraints: Do not delete card assets, legacy source files, or historical card records; improve path resolution only.
Do not change authoritative gameplay rules or deck composition logic beyond presentation-safe asset lookup adjustments.
Keep changes scoped to battle presentation and asset helper consistency within the existing app structure.
deliverables: battleV2 card art lookup uses the shared card image helper instead of hardcoded jpg whitelist paths.
Battle minion and battle-layer visual assets use shared helper-generated paths instead of raw assets/... strings.
Any touched battle presentation components preserve existing behavior while improving migrated-id and packaged-path compatibility.
